message:
test(api): add status/share/roadmap route tests, fix prompts crypto mock (bd-p4w5)

Fix broken crypto module mock in prompts route test (missing default export).
Add unit tests for /api/status (6 tests), /api/share (12 tests), and
/api/roadmap (17 tests) covering GET/POST handlers, validation, filtering,
cache headers, and error cases. All 86 test files pass (2353 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
